design_philosophy: Swiss Brutalist, tool-oriented, high contrast, typography-driven, no unnecessary decorations.

layout.spacing_scale: p-4, p-8, p-12 for containers; gap-4, gap-8 for structure.

structure.app_container: h-screen w-full flex flex-col md:flex-row overflow-hidden bg-white
structure.sidebar_left: w-full md:w-80 border-r border-[#E5E5E5] bg-[#F9F9F9] p-6 flex flex-col gap-6 overflow-y-auto
structure.main_canvas: flex-1 flex flex-col bg-white p-8 overflow-y-auto relative items-center justify-center
structure.sidebar_right: w-full md:w-96 border-l border-[#E5E5E5] bg-[#F9F9F9] p-6 flex flex-col gap-6 overflow-y-auto

layout.grid_component: A CSS Grid or Table based component representing the crossword. Must enforce sharp edges, 1px solid black borders, 1:1 aspect ratio cells.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002380] rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors duration-200
buttons.destructive: bg-transparent border border-[#E53935] text-[#E53935] hover:bg-[#E53935] hover:text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors duration-200

components.inputs: bg-white border border-[#0A0A0A]/20 rounded-none px-4 py-2 focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#002FA7] transition-colors
components.file_upload: border-2 border-dashed border-[#0A0A0A]/20 bg-white hover:bg-[#F9F9F9] p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 cursor-pointer rounded-none transition-colors
components.word_proposal_card: bg-white border border-[#0A0A0A]/20 p-6 flex flex-col gap-4 shadow-sm rounded-none

motion.interactions: Fast, crisp transitions (duration-150). No bouncy animations.
motion.grid_updates: Instant or very subtle fade-in for placed words.

images.description: Abstract black and white grid texture to be used as a subtle background pattern (very low opacity, e.g., opacity-5) in the empty state of the central canvas.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a French Crossword Generator tool. UI copy must be in French (e.g., 'Générateur de Mots Croisés', 'Lignes', 'Colonnes', 'Valider', 'Rejeter', 'Mot Horizontal', 'Mot Vertical').
Implement a 3-column layout: Left sidebar (Configuration), Center (Crossword Grid), Right sidebar (Proposals & Actions).
Apply the Swiss Brutalist aesthetic: Use sharp corners (rounded-none), high contrast, and 1px borders instead of drop shadows.
Typography: Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for headings, 'IBM Plex Sans' for UI body, and 'IBM Plex Mono' strictly for the crossword grid cells to ensure proper alignment and a technical feel.

The Grid: Implement a responsive grid where cells maintain a 1:1 aspect ratio. Letter cells are white with black text. Blocked (black) cells are pure black. Active/Highlighted cells use the primary blue (#E6EFFF).
The Flow: 1. Setup size & upload dictionary. 2. Prompt for 1st Horizontal and 1st Vertical word. 3. Automatically place black squares. 4. Propose new words iteratively on the right panel.
Ensure all interactive elements have explicit 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='valider-mot', data-testid='rejeter-mot', data-testid='upload-dico').
Do not use generic Shadcn cards with rounded corners. Override Shadcn defaults to match the sharp, border-driven Swiss style.
No placeholder images. Use the provided abstract texture subtly in the background if the grid is empty.
